# barracudawaf_administrator_role (Resource)

`barracudawaf_administrator_role` manages `Administrator Role` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_administrator_role" "test_role" {
    name = "test_terraform_role"
    api_privilege = "Yes"
    role_type = "Regular"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Role Name

### Optional

- **api_privilege** (String) API Privilege
- **authentication_services** (List of String) Auth Services
- **objects** (List of String) Object access permissions
- **operations** (List of String) Specify Allowed Operations
- **role_type** (String) Role Type
- **security_policies** (List of String) Security Policies
- **service_groups** (List of String) Service Group
- **services** (List of String) Services
- **vsites** (List of String) Vsites
